description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the debian:12 Docker image and defines two stages: build and package, with DEPENS and METEO_REPO variables. In the build stage add a build:debian job that runs apt-get update -y and apt-get -y install $DEPENS, then executes meson --prefix /usr/ build followed by ninja -C build install. In the package stage add a package:debian job that depends on build:debian, runs only on Git tags, runs apt-get update -y and apt-get install -y $DEPENS, clones $METEO_REPO, and runs cd meteo && dpkg-checkbuilddeps && dpkg-buildpackage. The package job publishes any generated .deb files as artifacts named $CI_PROJECT_NAME%-$CI_COMMIT_TAG, with paths ./*.deb and when on_success. No services or caches are used.
